executives.name: David Dorman
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of AT&T Corp. and former Chairman of CVS Health Corporation.

executives.name: Devin Wenig
executives.background: Former President and CEO of eBay Inc.

executives.name: Edward Barnholt
executives.background: Edward Barnholt is the Chairman of the Board of KLA. He was formerly the President and CEO of Agilent Technologies, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Frank Yeary
executives.background: Frank D. Yeary has been a director since 2009 and Chairman since January 2023. He is Principal of Darwin Capital Advisors, LLC and was previously Executive Vice Chairman of CamberView Partners, LLC and Vice Chancellor of UC Berkeley.

executives.name: John Donahoe
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Nike, Inc. Former CEO of ServiceNow.

executives.name: Marc Andreessen
executives.background: Co-founder and General Partner of Andreessen Horowitz.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Margaret Whitman
executives.background: U.S. Ambassador to Kenya; former CEO of Hewlett Packard Enterprise.

executives.name: Maynard Webb
executives.background: Founder of Webb Investment Network and former COO of eBay Inc. He has served as a Director since 2006.

executives.name: Peggy Alford
executives.background: Executive Vice President, Global Sales at PayPal Holdings, Inc.

executives.name: Scott Schenkel
executives.background: Scott F. Schenkel has been a member of our Board since November 2017. He previously served as the interim Chief Executive Officer of eBay Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
